name: Azure DevOps REST API
description: Azure DevOps provides CI/CD pipelines, Git repositories, work item tracking, and project management for software development teams. Use this API to manage projects, create and query work items, trigger pipeline runs, manage repositories, pull requests, and build definitions across your Azure DevOps organization.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: List all projects in an Azure DevOps organization.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific project by name or ID.

capabilities.name: work_items_get
capabilities.description: Get a work item by ID.

capabilities.name: work_items_create
capabilities.description: Create a new work item using JSON Patch operations.

capabilities.name: work_items_update
capabilities.description: Update a work item using JSON Patch operations.

capabilities.name: work_items_query
capabilities.description: Run a WIQL query to find work items.

capabilities.name: repos_list
capabilities.description: List Git repositories in a project.

capabilities.name: pull_requests_list
capabilities.description: List pull requests in a repository.
